steps.command: wp eval '$u = get_user_by("login", "citest"); $ok = defined("FORCE_2FA_LOADED") && class_exists("Two_Factor_Core") && Two_Factor_Core::is_user_using_two_factor(1) && $u && Two_Factor_Core::is_user_using_two_factor($u->ID) && in_array("Two_Factor_Email", (array) Two_Factor_Core::get_enabled_providers_for_user(1), true); file_put_contents("/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/force-email-two-factor/.ci-result", $ok ? "FORCE2FA_ASSERT_OK" : "FORCE2FA_ASSERT_FAIL");'
